questionHtml:
Which property increases down group 1?

A.  atomic radius

B.  electronegativity

C.  first ionization energy

D.  melting point

meta.title: Which property increases down group 1? A. atomic radius B. electronegativity C. first ionization energy D. melting point
breadcrumbLabels: Structure 3.1—The periodic table: Classification of elements
Structure 3.1.3—Periodicity refers to trends in properties of elements across a period and down a group.
